nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Moles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Moll , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.
Catalan: habitational name from any of various minor places called Moles, from the plural of mola (see Mola ).
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Meulles (Calvados). See also   Moyles  .

variants.name: Moll
meanings: English (Norfolk): from the Middle English female personal name Moll(e), Mol, a common pet form of Maud (see Mould and Maude ).

English (Norfolk): nickname from Middle English molle, mol(e), moul ‘mole’ (the burrowing animal), given perhaps to someone who wore moleskin, a mole catcher, or to someone with poor sight, or alternatively from Middle English mol ‘effeminate man’.
German: nickname from a dialect term for a plump, stout person. This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine) and Poland.

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

en.lifeSummary: Mrs. John de Moles was born in 1226, in St Germans, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom. She had at least 2 sons with John de Moles (2 Sons). She died in her hometown.

ko.lifeSummary: Mrs. John de Moles(은)는 1226년 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 스트 그먼스에서 태어났다. 그녀는 John de Moles (2 Sons)(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 그녀의 고향에서 사망했다.
